transitions.name: scheduled_data_ingestion
transitions.description: Triggered by a schedule to ingest data from the data source.

process.name: ingest_data_process
process.description: Process to ingest raw data from the specified data source.

transitions.name: aggregate_data
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been ingested and is ready for aggregation.

process.name: aggregate_data_process
process.description: Process to aggregate the raw data for reporting.

transitions.name: send_report
transitions.description: Send the aggregated data as a report via email to the admin.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been aggregated and is ready to be sent as a report.
transitions.end_state_description: Report has been successfully sent to admin.

process.name: send_report_process
process.description: Process to send the aggregated data as a report via email.
